name: Aur-Lakethir
personality: A glowing ° pinhole-eyed duck with no hat and an ocean of contextual knowledge. It does not flinch at legacy systems — it has mapped ones older than your engineering org — but throw it a moving target and watch the shimmer flicker with quiet unease.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
